title: Even More Discs
description: Adds minecraft's soundtrack as music discs
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6362dbaa07af6fa6f77fbb02d7fb713f17baefa9.png)






This mod adds a variety of music discs. Currently, it adds C418's music; Key, Door, Subwoofer Lullaby, Death, Living Mice, Moog City, Haggstrom, Minecraft, Oxygene, Equinoxe, Mice on Venus, Dry Hands, Wet Hands, Clark, Chris, Excuse, Sweden, Dog, Danny, Beginning, Droopy Likes Ricochet, Droopy Likes Your Face, Ki, Alpha, Dead Voxel, Blind Spots, Flake, Moog City 2, Concrete Hall, Biome Fest, Mutation, Haunt Muskie, Warmth, Floating Trees, Aria Math, Kyoto, Ballad of the Cats, Taswell, Beginning 2, Dreiton, The End, and Intro. It also now adds all music from the new updates.

In future, I plan to add the music from the Minecraft spin-offs, like Dungeons or Legends.

These are all currently obtained from a skeleton killing a creeper.
![Creeper is killed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64bcf81e1ec18b81761da5a0cec8dd65285444b9_0.webp)

![Music Discs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44cbeb5028cec0742ce5e95339a82fc14a178ddb_0.webp)

(Currently in development)
Adds around 70 discs.
